pr_ci_status.note: 27 open PRs total (23 Repo Assist + PR #62, 4 Maintainer). All PRs based on main SHA 5b7e3a2. Verified clean 2026-05-20. Maintainer PRs #68, #69, #72 fail cargo fmt --check (need manual fix). PR #67 passes clean. IMPORTANT: push_to_pull_request_branch CANNOT push to maintainer PRs — tool requires '[Repo Assist]' title prefix.

codebase_findings.spool-ui-tests: spool-ui crate has 94 unit tests inline in app.rs (up from 79). Tests now cover StatusFilter/SortBy enum cycling, App navigation, combined filter/sort logic (status+stream+search), and sort correctness. REMAINING GAP: silent TUI reload errors.
codebase_findings.validation-extension-opportunity: DONE — PR #86 extends validation.rs to check priority (p0-p3), assignee (@-prefix for d.assignee and d.to), resolution (done/wontfix/duplicate/obsolete). All as warnings. 7 new tests, 267 total pass.
codebase_findings.push-to-pr-title-constraint: push_to_pull_request_branch requires PR title to start with '[Repo Assist]'. Cannot push to maintainer PRs #68/#69/#72. This was causing repeated failures on 2026-05-04/05/06 runs (all reported in issue #73).
codebase_findings.pr62-not-draft: PR #62 (spool block/unblock) is NOT marked as draft — it is a regular open PR ready for review. Created 2026-03-10.
codebase_findings.all-prs-on-current-main: All PRs verified 2026-05-20 as based on main SHA 5b7e3a2. All have mergeable_state: clean.
codebase_findings.cli-list-sort-gap-closed: PR #85 adds --sort flag to spool list (priority/title/updated/created). TUI already had sort; CLI now has parity.
codebase_findings.empty-name-validation-gap: FIXED — PR #87 (2026-05-18) adds checks in add_task() and add_stream() to reject empty/whitespace-only names with 4 new integration tests.
codebase_findings.combined-filter-tests-gap: FIXED — PR #88 (2026-05-19) adds apply_filters_and_sort test helper + 15 combined filter tests (status+stream+search intersections, sort correctness). 94 spool-ui tests pass.
codebase_findings.silent-tui-reload-errors: reload_tasks() errors silently ignored in app.rs (19 call sites). Could surface errors to TUI user. Deferred until PR backlog reduces.
codebase_findings.release-pr55-branch: PR #55 head commit a9d0fa4 on branch repo-assist/release-v1.2.1-74e2acfcd3cf1599 — CHANGELOG correct.
